markdown:
#  When does Procore send email notifications to invoice contacts? 
##  Answer 
An _Invoice Contact_ is a person who ensures that an invoice is submitted to an upstream contractor for payment. In Procore, an invoice contact is always an employee of the designated 'Contract Company' on a purchase order or subcontract. The contract company is the party responsible for performing work and/or supplying materials for a project. For customers in the United States using Procore's Progress Billings tool, this term is synonymous with progress billing contact.
  * **When does Procore send email notifications to invoice contacts?** See [Do invoice contacts receive emails from Procore? ](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-an-invoice-contact)
  * **When does Procore send email notifications to members of the 'Invoice Distribution' list?** Members added to the Commitment tool's 'Invoice Distribution' list (see [Configure Settings: Commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-commitments)) receive notifications when:
    * The status of the Subcontractor Schedule of Values changes to '_Under Review_.' See [Review a Subcontractor SOV for a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/review-a-commitments-subcontractor-schedule-of-values).
    * If your team is NOT using a [Subcontractor Invoice Workflow](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/configure-a-custom-workflow-template-for-subcontractor-invoices-on-a-project), when status of the subcontractor invoice changes to 'Under Review'. Note: If your team is using a Subcontractor Invoice Workflow, the notification is sent to the Workflow Assignee(s).


## See Also
  * [What is an invoice contact?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-an-invoice-contact)
  * [What are the default statuses for Procore invoices?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-default-statuses-for-procore-invoices)
  * [Does an invoice contact need an 'Invite to Bill' to submit an invoice?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-does-an-invoice-contact-need-an-invite-to-bill-to-submit-an-invoice)
title: When does Procore send email notifications to invoice contacts?
description: Describes the events that lead Procore to send email notification messages to an invoice contact on a purchase order or subcontract.
